user_query: I'm organizing a health and wellness event for my friends and family. Can you recommend healthy food options and provide guidelines for planning a successful event? Also, suggest some healthcare facilities in the event venue area.

TaskList.description: Research and compile a list of healthy food options suitable for a wellness event.
Create guidelines for planning a successful health and wellness event, including logistics, activities, and engagement strategies.
Identify and list healthcare facilities in the vicinity of the event venue.
